killed_hypotheses.title: Electric Field-Directed Condensate Positioning Explains Left-Right Asymmetry Breaking
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Electrophoretic force from physiological electric fields (~10^-17 N) is ~1000x too weak to overcome thermal noise (~10^-14 N). Established cilia-based mechanism explains laterality.

killed_hypotheses.title: Morphogenetic Memory Is Physically Stored in Self-Sustaining Condensate-Voltage Circuits
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Dropped (not killed): Condensate lifetime (minutes-hours) incompatible with memory duration (weeks-months). 1,6-hexanediol test fatally confounded by kinase/phosphatase inhibition.

killed_hypotheses.title: Gap Junction-Mediated Ion Sharing Creates Tissue-Scale Condensate Coherence Domains
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Dropped: Quantitative argument too weak. Gap junction ion transfer magnitude likely insufficient to shift condensate formation thresholds in receiving cells.

surviving_hypotheses: V-ATPase pH-Condensate Nodes as the Molecular Effector Layer of the Bioelectric Code
Calcium-Gated Condensate Dissolution as the Binary Transduction Step in Bioelectric Pattern Reading
Circadian V-ATPase Rhythms and Tissue-Specific Condensate Phase Diagrams Determine Chronovulnerability to Neurodegeneration
Wound-Edge V-ATPase Activation Triggers Condensate Dissolution Wave as a Rapid Regenerative Signal

Levin 2023 - bioelectric code as computational medium
2025 Nat Chem - condensates sustain pH gradients without energy

lessons_learned: Disjoint field pairs produce highest novelty; the bioelectric x condensate pair had no cross-citations
V-ATPase emerged as the strongest bridge concept across ALL four final hypotheses
Back-of-envelope physics calculations are essential for filtering impossible hypotheses early (saved H8 from wasting pipeline time)
pH-mediated mechanisms are more tractable than direct electric field effects on condensates
The most groundable hypotheses use INDIRECT bioelectric effects (via pH, Ca2+) rather than direct electric field effects

killed_hypotheses.title: Hair Follicle Placode Spacing Emerges from a Topological Defect Lattice in the Embryonic Epidermal Nematic
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Edar mechanosensitivity bridge entirely speculative. Turing reaction-diffusion models already explain spacing. Adds complexity without added explanatory power.

killed_hypotheses.title: Bone Marrow HSC Niche Quiescence Is Maintained by Shear-Free Zones at -1/2 Nematic Defects in Sinusoidal Endothelium
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Sinusoidal endothelium is fenestrated and too disordered for nematic order. Also targets wrong vascular compartment (HSC quiescence is arteriolar, not sinusoidal).

killed_hypotheses.title: Cancer Stem Cell Niches Self-Organize at Topological Defects in Tumor Cell Nematic Fields
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Active area (Saw group already exploring defects in cancer). Reduced novelty. CSC identity may be a dynamic state, not positionable. 3D tumor complexity limits 2D framework.

killed_hypotheses.title: Stem Cell Niche Aging Is Driven by Loss of Nematic Order and Consequent Defect Delocalization
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Vocabulary re-description of known phenomena (aging -> tissue disorganization). Fabricated quantitative parameters (S values). No mechanistic advantage over existing explanations.

killed_hypotheses.title: Geometric Frustration of the Nematic Field at Tissue Boundaries Creates Defect Reservoirs
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Universality claim falsified (many tissue interfaces lack stem cells). Reverses developmental causation.

killed_hypotheses.title: Topological Charge Conservation Constrains the Total Number of Stem Cell Niches Per Organ
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Mathematically invalid. Topological charge conservation constrains NET charge, not TOTAL defect number. Small intestine has ~10M crypts vs topological minimum of 0.

surviving_hypotheses: Organoid Symmetry Breaking Is a Topological Defect Nucleation Event
Activity-Dependent Crypt Fission Is Triggered When Local Epithelial Contractility Exceeds the Nematic Defect-Splitting Threshold
Wound-Induced Topological Defects Serve as Transient Stem Cell Attractors That Become Permanent Niches When Pinned by ECM Stiffness Gradients

Maroudas-Sacks et al. 2021 Nature Physics -- defects organize body axis in Hydra

lessons_learned: Poincare-Hopf theorem provides mathematically NECESSARY predictions that cannot be dismissed -- the strongest possible foundation for a hypothesis
The single most critical assumption is whether a given tissue exhibits measurable nematic order -- this determines whether the entire framework applies

Quantitative back-of-envelope estimates are essential: the concentration enhancement for free diffusion was negligible (~1%), killing the original H6 mechanism, while restricted-diffusion morphogens gave meaningful ~30% enhancement
Universal claims are dangerous: 'all tissue interfaces have stem cells' was immediately falsifiable. Scope hypotheses to specific tissues where the assumptions hold
Vocabulary re-description without mechanistic insight is a failure mode (H7 'nematic order parameter' was just 'cell polarity' in physics language)
Mathematical validity must be checked: the topological charge conservation hypothesis was mathematically invalid because it confused NET charge with TOTAL defect number
The organoid experimental system provides the cleanest test: controlled geometry + topology + existing culture technology = rapid falsification
DISJOINT field pairs continue to produce the highest novelty -- active matter physicists and stem cell biologists have zero cross-citations

killed_hypotheses.title: Cryptochrome Radical Pair Terahertz Resonance Enables Quantum Compass Navigation
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Fundamental energy scale mismatch: 0.28 THz = 1.16 meV << 26 meV thermal energy at 300K. Thermal fluctuations overwhelm quantum oscillations by 22x.

killed_hypotheses.title: Enzyme Active Site Quantum Oscillations Create Catalytic Fröhlich Condensates
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Coherent Fröhlich condensates thermodynamically impossible at biological temperatures (requires 100M K)

killed_hypotheses.title: Microtubule Tryptophan Networks Generate Terahertz Quantum Information Highways
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Quantum information storage impossible in noisy biological environment; mechanism unfalsifiable; quantitative claims unverifiable

killed_hypotheses.title: Protein Folding Quantum Tunneling Events Are Coordinated by Terahertz Coherence
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Heavy-atom quantum tunneling coordination thermodynamically implausible at biological temperatures

killed_hypotheses.title: Biological Quantum Entanglement Manifests as Terahertz Bell State Oscillations
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Quantum entanglement impossible to maintain in biological environments; detection scheme technically infeasible

killed_hypotheses.title: ATP Synthase Rotor Dynamics Are Quantized Through Terahertz Cavity Resonances
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Quantum rotor dynamics unnecessary; classical conformational mechanics fully explains observed behavior. Energy level spacing << thermal energy.

killed_hypotheses.title: DNA Base Stacking Quantum Coherence Is Stabilized by Terahertz Sugar-Phosphate Oscillations
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Aqueous environment challenges coherence claims; decoherence timescales incompatible with proposed mechanism

killed_hypotheses.title: Cryptochrome-6 Plant Magnetoreception Uses Dual-Frequency THz Absorption for Solar Compass Navigation
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Citation hallucination - Ahmad et al. 2024 reference cannot be verified

killed_hypotheses.title: V-Type ATPase Quantum Rotor Networks Create Tissue-Scale THz Standing Wave Patterns
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Collective quantum effects at tissue scales lack empirical foundation

killed_hypotheses.title: Biological Cavity Quantum Electrodynamics in Chlorophyll-Protein Antenna Complexes
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Biological systems lack electromagnetic properties necessary for cavity QED

killed_hypotheses.title: Microtubule Quantum Criticality Enables Long-Range Cellular Signaling via THz Coherent Oscillations
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Quantum criticality requires impossible precision in biological systems

surviving_hypotheses: Quantitative Vibronic Coherence Extension in PSII Reaction Centers
Multi-Spectral Vibronic Coherence Transfer Between Photosynthetic Complexes
key_papers: Azizi et al. 2023 - terahertz modes in photoexcited proteins (foundation paper)
Huang et al. 2025 - THz-2DCS methodology for quantum coherence detection
Romanello & Romanello 2026 - quantum logic gates in enzyme catalysis
Fromme et al. 2001 Nature - PSI structure critical for vibronic coupling mechanisms
Ferreira et al. 2004 - PSII structure enabling inter-complex coupling

lessons_learned: Thermal energy validation (kT = 26 meV @ 300K) is the strongest predictor of quantum biology hypothesis survival - 75% of failures due to energy scale mismatch
Vibronic coupling mechanisms show exceptional survival rate (100%) across photosynthetic systems vs direct quantum oscillations (0% survival)
Citation verification is critical - unverifiable references cause automatic quality gate failure regardless of mechanism quality
Thermal-assisted quantum mechanisms (sub-picosecond or constructive thermal noise) survive evolution while thermal-resistant mechanisms fail
Recent breakthrough radiation strategy achieved 33% survival rate (15 generated → 5 survived → 2 passed quality gate)
Inter-complex coupling extensions of proven single-complex mechanisms provide viable evolutionary pathways
DISJOINT field strategy continues high effectiveness - zero existing cross-citations between THz spectroscopy and biological quantum coherence
Evolution process shows 100% success rate in improving hypothesis quality through quantitative specification and experimental protocol addition

Kagan et al. Nat Chem Biol 2017 - oxidized PUFA-PE drives ferroptosis

lessons_learned: Scale-bridging strategy highly effective for geochemistry-biology pairs: shared iron chemistry enables 4 distinct hypothesis approaches from 1 target

Tool transfer (PHREEQC, Pourbaix) outperforms condition transfer (alkaline pH, abiotic PUFAs): applying geochemistry tools to biology has high novelty; trying to replicate geochemistry conditions in biology fails
Back-of-envelope consistency checks are essential: PHREEQC crossover prediction was ~40x off from its own stated log K values, caught only at Quality Gate and cross-model validation
Counter-evidence drives dramatic cycle improvement: cycle 1 survival 40% -> cycle 2 survival 86% by incorporating LIP non-expansion, ferryl pH transition, and GPX4/ACSL4 dominance

Bridge must be diagnostic: GPT correctly identified that ferrihydrite/PHREEQC/Pourbaix are generic iron chemistry tools, not serpentinization-specific. Future sessions should ensure bridge concepts are specific to the claimed geochemical setting
Mathematical correctness != biological relevance: Gemini scored all hypotheses 8-10/10 (math correct) while GPT scored 2-4/10 (biology uncertain). Both perspectives are needed

Journal attribution errors are a recurring minor issue: Theil 2004 (Nutr not Biochem), Hider 2013 (Dalton Trans not BioMetals). Content was accurate in both cases. Add journal verification to groundedness protocol
Vocabulary re-description remains a kill pattern: applying geochemical notation (Kd partition coefficients) to cell biology without predictive power is always caught by the Critic

killed_hypotheses.title: CISD2 [2Fe-2S] as Redox-Gated ER-Mito Ca2+ Timer (original version)
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Critic FATAL: CISD2 redox midpoint +24mV actual (Biomedicines 2021), not -10mV claimed from mitoNEET data. NAD+/NADH cycling thermodynamically impossible at correct potential. QG later gave CONDITIONAL_PASS with corrected parameters.

killed_hypotheses.title: NADPH→FDXR→FDX2 Electron Supply Chain as Circadian Fe-S Assembly Gatekeeper
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: QG FAIL: FDXR Km = 0.7µM (Barros & Carlson 1992), not ~5µM as estimated. At physiological NADPH (50-100µM), FDXR >99% saturated. 30% NADPH oscillation produces <1% rate change.

killed_hypotheses.title: Cytoplasmic Prx1/2 H2O2 Oscillation as Non-Transcriptional Timer for Fe-S Proteins
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Critic WEAKENED: 2-3 orders of magnitude H2O2 gap — predicted 10-100 nM pulse vs IRP1 threshold ~1-10 µM (Pantopoulos 1998). Prx2 hyperoxidation in nucleated cells may not produce cytoplasmic H2O2 pulses like in RBCs.

CIA Pathway as LIP/ROS-Responsive Circadian Gate for Cytoplasmic Fe-S Proteome (CONDITIONAL_PASS 7/10)
Frataxin-Gated Fe-S Assembly via Mitochondrial LIP in FTMT-Negative Tissues (CONDITIONAL_PASS 6/10)

lessons_learned: Published gap papers are gold: Nadimpalli 2024 explicitly identifies IRP1 cluster occupancy as unmeasured → H2.1 scored highest (PASS 8/10). Scout should search for review papers listing 'unmeasured variables'
Km pre-verification is essential: FDXR Km=0.7µM killed H2.5. For any enzyme-gated mechanism, verify Km vs physiological [S]. If Km << [S], enzyme is saturated
Critic/QG calibration: Critic FATAL on H2.3 (wrong midpoint) vs QG CONDITIONAL_PASS (correctable error). Correctable parametric errors should not be FATAL kills
Redox midpoint must be verified for the specific protein isoform, not homologs: mitoNEET ≠ CISD2
Fe-S biology is an excellent domain: rich molecular infrastructure, published quantitative gaps, JCI 2026 precedent establishes field is active
Triple-intersection bridges (longevity × circadian × Fe-S via CISD2) produce highest novelty but higher parametric error risk
Conservation gap with time lag (14-year Drosophila → mammalian follow-up gap) is a productive bridge type
6 distinct bridge types across 6 hypotheses with zero convergence — unprecedented diversity. Diversity constraint working well
network_gap_analysis confirmed as dominant strategy: 38% QG pass rate across S006+S007 (11/29)

note: Target 3 adversarial literature evaluation (not primary target of this session)

targets.field_a: Biofilm matrix polysaccharide mechanics (Psl/Pel/alginate in P. aeruginosa)
targets.field_c: Cartilage ECM biomechanics (biphasic/triphasic theory, Donnan equilibrium, aggregate modulus)
bridge_concepts: Biphasic theory (Mow 1980) - solid+fluid mixture, never applied to biofilms
Fixed charge density (FCD) - measured in cartilage, NEVER measured in biofilms
Aggregate modulus H_a - standard cartilage parameter, unmeasured in biofilm
Hydraulic permeability k - couples deformation to fluid transport, unmeasured in biofilm
Donnan osmotic pressure - invoked qualitatively in biofilm 2025, never quantified
Triphasic theory (Lai 1991) - alginate carboxylates analog to GAG sulfates

key_findings: Zero papers found connecting biofilm mechanics to Mow 1980 biphasic theory or cartilage parameter space
Kundukad 2025 (NPJ Biofilms) invokes Donnan equilibrium qualitatively for alginate biofilms - no cartilage citation, no FCD measurement
Carpio 2019 independently derives Mow-equivalent equations for biofilms - without citing Mow, no experimental parameters
Governing equations are formally identical (mixture theory + Darcy flow + osmotic coupling) - mathematical isomorphism confirmed
State-of-art biofilm mechanics (Siri 2025) measures G'/G' - NOT H_a or k - framework mismatch is the gap
P. aeruginosa: Pel=cationic, Psl=neutral, alginate=anionic - charge heterogeneity unmapped by FCD
Cartilage H_a = 0.5-0.9 MPa; biofilm elastic modulus = 1-1000 Pa (5-6 orders of magnitude softer)
unmeasured_parameters: Fixed charge density (FCD) of alginate biofilm in mEq/mL
Aggregate modulus H_a of biofilm via confined compression
Hydraulic permeability k in biphasic units (m4/Ns)
Donnan osmotic pressure as function of ionic strength
Net FCD in mixed Pel+Psl+alginate biofilm
lessons_learned: Mathematical isomorphism (same PDEs independently derived) is strongest evidence of deep analogy
Both fields invoke overlapping physics but zero cross-citations - clean DISJOINT despite shared mathematics
The 'charge heterogeneity' of biofilm (cationic Pel, neutral Psl, anionic alginate) is exactly the complexity triphasic theory handles
FCD measurement is the keystone missing experiment - all other parameter measurements follow from it
Biofilm mechanics field explicitly lacks standardized predictive framework (identified as priority gap) - creates opportunity for cartilage-inspired approach

targets.field_c: Deinococcus radiodurans Mn-antioxidant biology (Mn-OP complexes, radiation resistance)
bridge_concepts: Mn2+/Mn3+ catalytic SOD-mimetic cycling — speciation determines pro- vs anti-oxidant outcome
Mitochondrial Complex I as convergence point

targets.field_a: Plant melatonin stress biology (SNAT/ASMT, ROS scavenging, NPQ photoprotection)
targets.field_c: Coral bleaching / Symbiodiniaceae thermal tolerance (heat-induced ROS, PSII photoinhibition)

targets.field_a: Volcanic glass dissolution kinetics (TST rate law, saturation index, PHREEQC)
targets.field_c: Amorphous solid dispersion dissolution (pharmaceutical science, ~40% new drugs)
bridge_concepts: TST dissolution rate law: Rate = k+·A·(1-exp(DGr/RT))
Saturation index SI = log(IAP/Ksp) as master dissolution variable

lessons_learned: All 3 strategies (contradiction_mining, Swanson_ABC_bridging, tool_repurposing) used as primary for first time — building empirical performance data
Swanson ABC bridging confirmed viable: melatonin B-term appears in plant stress literature AND dinoflagellate biochemistry with zero cross-citations to coral bleaching
Contradiction mining produced specific bridge (Mn speciation paradox) but convergence risk detected — Daly lab DP1 peptide (PNAS 2024) narrows the gap
Tool repurposing from geochemistry to pharmaceutical science is a completely new domain transfer (prior transfers were geochemistry → cell biology)
Web verification essential: discovered Avrami kinetics already used in pharma (crystallization) — refined bridge to emphasize TST/SI which are genuinely novel
